biography: Joni, a familiar name at the Hill Side Golf Club, is known for his composed demeanour on the course. While some might see him as reserved, those who know him well appreciate his sharp wit and unwavering determination.

Joni has graced the fairways of the Hector Trophée on one occasion, marking his presence with a notable victory. Although he has never lifted the Victor Trophy, his contributions to the pair competition remain a highlight of his career.
While Joni is considered as retired from Hector Trophée events and is not expected to participate in Hector Trophée 2026, golf enthusiasts remember his past performance and impact.
